description:
Parent epic: V3 E1: Simplified DSL foundation

Source task 7/13 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Define conditional control syntax:

  ```elixir
  operation MyApp.Controls.RequireApproval,
    when: [kind: :action, name: :refund_customer]
  ```

Epic closure criteria:
- the simplified DSL is the only documented DSL
- pre-V3 DSL shapes are removed
- DSL tests cover success, failure, and error-message quality

comments.text: Implemented conditional operation control syntax: operation MyControl, when: [kind: :action, name: :add_numbers]. The DSL stores normalized operation match metadata, the guardrail/control normalizer preserves it, and the runtime preflight callback skips controls that do not match the operation. Verification: mix format --check-formatted, mix compile --warnings-as-errors, focused guardrail/DSL tests, mix test.

title: E1: Define conditional control syntax:
